description_long: This is a bifold wallet with a striking blue exterior and a brown interior. The exterior surface has a textured, almost suede-like appearance with subtle color gradients and visible stitching along the edges. The interior features multiple card slots, each outlined with stitching, and a large compartment for bills. The wallet appears slim and compact, designed for easy carrying in a pocket. There is some faint text or marking on the lower right corner of the exterior, but no prominent logo. The overall construction suggests a combination of synthetic or treated leather materials.
description: A slim, blue bifold wallet with a textured exterior and brown interior card slots, featuring visible stitching and a subtle text marking.
description_view_0: Interior view showing brown card slots and bill compartment, with blue textured exterior visible on the edges.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the blue textured exterior and the open edge revealing the brown interior slots.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the plain blue exterior surface with subtle color gradients and faint text at the bottom.
description_view_3: Side view of the blue exterior, showing the wallet's thickness and a partial glimpse of the interior.
